actions.action: Open latest posts, reply only to real football discussion where pick-3 or prediction angle fits.
actions.copy:
Good football question. I am asking people for exactly 3 World Cup picks before the event starts.

Pick free first and see your private points preview:
https://worldcup26.world/login?ref=26BC4B90CB&utm_source=x-target-hunter&utm_medium=manual-reply&utm_campaign=worldcup26_platform_rotation&utm_content=xh-15_spain-world-cup-2026

Code: 26BC4B90CB
actions.proofCommand: node campaign-x-reply-log.mjs --worker "Memo" --proof-url "<REAL_X_REPLY_URL_OR_PRIVATE_NOTE>" --target "<@handle or tweet URL>" --query "Spain World Cup 2026" --timestamp-eest "<YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm EEST>"
actions.proofInstruction: real X reply URL or precise private proof note

actions.action: Use the prediction-tracking angle: ask users to save their 3 picks free and compare how they age during the tournament.
actions.copy:
What are your 3 World Cup teams right now? I made mine here. Pick free first, ticket only if you want the paid leaderboard.

https://worldcup26.world/login?ref=26BC4B90CB&utm_source=reddit-sportsanalytics&utm_medium=manual-comment&utm_campaign=worldcup26_public_outreach&utm_content=fresh_prediction_kit_f14
actions.proofCommand: node campaign-public-channel-attempts.mjs --add --owner "Memo" --platform "Reddit" --channel "r/sportsanalytics printable prediction kit update" --status "posted" --attempt-url "https://www.reddit.com/r/sportsanalytics/comments/1tx0gm4/free_world_cup_2026_prediction_kit_updated/" --detail "public-url-or-mod-note: Reddit comment URL or moderator approval note with code/link included at YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm EEST"
actions.proofInstruction: public-url-or-mod-note: Reddit comment URL or moderator approval note with code/link included

actions.action: Find forum threads where prediction games are welcome; ask the 3-team question before sharing the link.
